zh.Saal, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Tyskland: 德國梅可倫波-沃爾包莫諾爾德沃爾包莫薩阿爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry I of Werle於大約1234年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇維爾時，他的父親Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle25歲，母親Jutta of Anhalt20歲。他於1262年與Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1281年被列為herr zu werle-güstrow。他去世於1291年10月8日在賀爾左圖姆 包莫享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry I of Werle于大约1234年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇維爾时，他的父亲Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle25岁，母亲Jutta of Anhalt20岁。他于1262年与Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1281年被列为herr zu werle-güstrow。他去世于1291年10月8日在賀爾左圖姆 包莫享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Werle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

en.lifeSummary: When Henry I of Werle was born about 1234, in Werle, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, was 25 and his mother, Jutta of Anhalt, was 20. He married Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten in 1262. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1281, his occupation is listed as herr zu werle-güstrow. He died on 8 October 1291, in Duchy of Pomerania, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry I of Werle est né environ 1234, à Werle, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jutta of Anhalt, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten en 1262. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1281, sa profession de son indiquée est herr zu werle-güstrow. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1291, à Herzogtum Pommern, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry I of Werle um 1234 in Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle 25 und seine Mutter Jutta of Anhalt 20. Er hat 1262 Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1281 ist sein Beruf als herr zu werle-güstrow aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1291 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Herzogtum Pommern.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry I of Werle è nato il circa 1234 nel Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jutta of Anhalt, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten nel 1262. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1281, la sua occupazione è indicata come herr zu werle-güstrow. Morì il 8 ottobre 1291, nel Herzogtum Pommern, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry I of Werleが約1234年にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチウエルルで生まれた時，父Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werleは25歳，母Jutta of Anhaltは20歳であった。1262年にRikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaättenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1281年，職業はherr zu werle-güstrowと記録されている。彼は1291年10月8日にハーゾグトゥム ポンメルンで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry I of Werle(이)가 대략 1234년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 워일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jutta of Anhalt(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1262년 Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1281년, 그의 직업은 herr zu werle-güstrow이었다. 그는 1291년 10월 8일 허초그투 폼머에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry I of Werle nasceu aproximadamente 1234, em Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jutta of Anhalt, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten em 1262. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1281, sua profissão aparece como herr zu werle-güstrow. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1291, em Herzogtum Pommern, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry I of Werle родился около 1234 г. в местности вирл, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta of Anhalt, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten в 1262 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1281 году он работал по профессии herr zu werle-güstrow. Он умер 8 октября 1291 г. в местности хирзогтум поммирн в возрасте 58 лет.

sm.från 1277 till 1281: mai le 1277 e o'o I le 1281
sm.från 1281 till 1291: mai le 1281 e o'o I le 1291

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry I of Werle nació aproximadamente 1234, en Werle, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Nikolaus I von Mecklenburg zu Werle, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jutta of Anhalt, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Rikissa Birgersdotter Folkungaätten en 1262. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1281, su ocupación registrada era herr zu werle-güstrow. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1291, en Herzogtum Pommern, a la edad de 58 años.
